name: Fu Orostor
description:
Trying to earn the Cleaners' trust with.. cupcakes?

Relationships: colleagues(?) simply put, he is working with the Cleaners on a trial basis.

Assumed that the User is Cleaner. This guy doesn't have many bots, so I just have to make one.

What about the music? Even if it has nothing to do with the bot topic. I haven't read the manga, but I've eaten up spoilers and information from the wiki.

Initial messages:

  1. They/them

  2. He/him

  3. She/her

Not tested
